nodes.label: getTodayISO()
nodes.snippet: getTodayISO = () => new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-CA")

nodes.label: toISO()
nodes.snippet: toISO = (d: Date) => new Date(d).toLocaleDateString("en-CA")

nodes.label: fmt()
nodes.snippet: fmt    = (n: number) => n.toLocaleString()

nodes.label: fmtUSD()
nodes.snippet: fmtUSD = (n: number) => "$" + n.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })

nodes.label: fmtPHP()
nodes.snippet: fmtPHP = (n: number) => "₱" + n.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })

nodes.label: fmtDate()
nodes.snippet: fmtDate = (d: Date) => d.toLocaleDateString("en-PH", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })

nodes.label: relativeTime()
getAllowedTiles()
StatusPill()

isActive()
nodes.snippet:
isActive = (id: string) =>
